items.claim: Santiago Ponzinibio is 39 years old and approaching the washed category.
items.quote: Pontanibio who's 39 years old who is is just approaching the WA or he's he's been approached the washed category.

items.claim: Santiago Ponzinibio's durability is compromised and he gets dropped or knocked out by multiple fighters.
items.quote: this guy's chin I think is dust. He's getting dropped by Carlson Harris. He's getting dropped by Alex Morono. He's getting you know knocked out by Kevin Holland.

items.claim: Sam Patterson possesses a ton of power, evidenced by first-round finishes of Danny Barlow and Trey Waters.
items.quote: Sam Patterson who has a ton of power. I mean, look at what Patterson did to Danny Barlo. Look at what Patterson did to Trey Waters both in round one.

items.claim: Trey Waters is extremely tough and had never been knocked out prior to fighting Sam Patterson.
items.quote: Trey Waters is stupid tough. Um, you know, I think that was the first time Waters had ever been knocked out
